# Astro

> Documentation corpus for Astro (framework).
> Crawled 386 pages from https://docs.astro.build/en/getting-started/

- [Font family not found](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/font-family-not-found/)

- [Image not found.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/image-not-found/)

- [You can't use the current function with the current strategy](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/incorrect-strategy-for-i18n/)
- [Invalid component arguments.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/invalid-component-args/)
- [Content entry data does not match schema.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/invalid-content-entry-data-error/)
- [Content entry frontmatter does not match schema.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/invalid-content-entry-frontmatter-error/)

- [Invalid dynamic route.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/invalid-dynamic-route/)
- [Invalid frontmatter injection.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/invalid-frontmatter-injection-error/)

- [Invalid entry inside getStaticPath's return value](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/invalid-get-static-paths-entry/)
- [Invalid value returned by getStaticPaths.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/invalid-get-static-paths-return/)
- [Invalid glob pattern.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/invalid-glob/)
- [Invalid internationalization middleware configuration](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/invalid-i18n-middleware-configuration/)
- [Error while loading image service.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/invalid-image-service/)
- [Invalid prerender export.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/invalid-prerender-export/)
- [Invalid redirect destination.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/invalid-redirect-destination/)
- [You attempted to rewrite a 404 inside a static page, and this isn't allowed.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/invalid-rewrite404/)
- [Legacy content config file found.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/legacy-content-config-error/)
- [Error in live content config.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/live-content-config-error/)
- [Local images must be imported.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/local-image-used-wrongly/)
- [Value assigned to locals is not accepted.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/locals-not-an-object/)
- [Astro.locals is not serializable](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/locals-not-serializable/)
- [locals must not be reassigned.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/locals-reassigned/)
- [Content collection frontmatter invalid.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/markdown-content-schema-validation-error/)
- [Failed to parse Markdown frontmatter.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/markdown-frontmatter-parse-error/)
- [Image not found.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/markdown-image-not-found/)
- [MDX integration missing.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/mdx-integration-missing-error/)
- [Can't load the middleware.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/middleware-cant-be-loaded/)
- [The middleware didn't return a Response.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/middleware-no-data-or-next-called/)
- [The middleware returned something that is not a Response object.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/middleware-not-aresponse/)
- [Missing image dimensions](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/missing-image-dimension/)
- [Index page not found.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/missing-index-for-internationalization/)
- [The provided locale does not exist.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/missing-locale/)
- [Missing value for client:media directive.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/missing-media-query-directive/)
- [Enabled manual internationalization routing without having a middleware.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/missing-middleware-for-internationalization/)
- [Could not find Sharp.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/missing-sharp/)
- [Content and data cannot be in same collection.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/mixed-content-data-collection-error/)
- [Cannot use Server Islands without an adapter.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/no-adapter-installed-server-islands/)
- [Cannot use Server-side Rendering without an adapter.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/no-adapter-installed/)
- [No client entrypoint specified in renderer.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/no-client-entrypoint/)
- [Missing hint on client:only directive.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/no-client-only-hint/)
- [Could not process image metadata.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/no-image-metadata/)
- [No import found for component.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/no-matching-import/)
- [No matching renderer found.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/no-matching-renderer/)
- [No static path found for requested path.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/no-matching-static-path-found/)
- [Prerendered routes aren't supported when internationalization domains are enabled.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/no-prerendered-routes-with-domains/)
- [Invalid type returned by Astro page.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/only-response-can-be-returned/)
- [Page number param not found.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/page-number-param-not-found/)
- [Astro.clientAddress cannot be used inside prerendered routes.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/prerender-client-address-not-available/)
- [Prerendered dynamic endpoint has path collision.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/prerender-dynamic-endpoint-path-collide/)
- [Prerendered route generates the same path as another route.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/prerender-route-conflict/)
- [A redirect must be given a location with the Location header.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/redirect-with-no-location/)
- [Remote image is not allowed](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/remote-image-not-allowed/)
- [Attempted to render an undefined content collection entry.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/render-undefined-entry-error/)
- [Invalid slot name.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/reserved-slot-name/)
- [Unable to set response.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/response-sent-error/)
- [Astro couldn't find the route to rewrite, or if was found but it emitted an error during the rendering phase.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/rewrite-encountered-an-error/)
- [Cannot use Astro.rewrite after the request body has been read](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/rewrite-with-body-used/)
- [Route not found.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/route-not-found/)
- [Module is only available server-side](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/server-only-module/)
- [Session storage was enabled but not configured.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/session-config-missing-error/)
- [Session flag not set](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/session-config-without-flag-error/)
- [Session storage could not be initialized.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/session-storage-init-error/)
- [Session data could not be saved.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/session-storage-save-error/)
- [Sessions cannot be used with an adapter that doesn't support server output.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/session-without-supported-adapter-output-error/)
- [Astro.clientAddress is not available in prerendered pages.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/static-client-address-not-available/)
- [Astro.redirect is not available in static mode.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/static-redirect-not-available/)
- [Unavailable Astro global in getStaticPaths()](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/unavailable-astro-global/)
- [Unhandled rejection](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/unhandled-rejection/)
- [Unknown CLI Error.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/unknown-clierror/)
- [Unknown compiler error.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/unknown-compiler-error/)
- [Unknown configuration error.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/unknown-config-error/)
- [Unknown Content Collection Error.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/unknown-content-collection-error/)
- [Unknown CSS Error.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/unknown-csserror/)
- [An unknown error occurred while reading or writing files to disk.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/unknown-filesystem-error/)
- [Unknown Markdown Error.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/unknown-markdown-error/)
- [Unknown Vite Error.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/unknown-vite-error/)
- [Unsupported transform in content config.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/unsupported-config-transform-error/)
- [Unsupported or malformed URL.](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/unsupported-external-redirect/)
- [Unsupported image conversion](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/unsupported-image-conversion/)
- [Unsupported image format](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/errors/unsupported-image-format/)

- [Experimental Intellisense for content collections](https://docs.astro.build/en/reference/experimental-flags/content-intellisense/)
